_note: DISABLED GEO crons, paused per LEA-28 (Phase 1.4 of LEA-20). The Learnanything.pro SEO/GEO/AEO program is paused until the LEA-19 conversion gate on 2026-06-12. These entries were removed from vercel.json `crons` to stop budget burn from failing scheduled runs (CEO-confirmed). vercel.json is strict JSON and cannot hold inline comments, so the disabled entries live here. To re-enable: merge each object below back into the `crons` array in vercel.json and delete this file. Do NOT re-enable before LEA-19 closes with a CTO recommendation that conversion thresholds are met. The matching `functions` maxDuration entries for /api/geo/* were intentionally left in vercel.json — they are inert config, not schedulers, and removing them is unnecessary churn.
